packs.label: Publishing · Single book on solid-color block
packs.composition: Single book cover centered on a solid-color square block, occupying roughly 50% of canvas; 25% breathing room above and below the book.
packs.technique: Single book on a saturated brand-color block; the block IS the background, no texture, no scene — the book IS the hero.

packs.label: Publishing · Multi-cover audiobook grid (designed)
packs.composition: Serif headline top-third (white on color OR dark on cream); 2x3 or 3x2 grid of small book covers below; brand mark bottom-center as a small wordmark.
packs.technique: Curated multi-cover grid under a large serif theme headline — sells a category (Historical Fiction, Romance) rather than a single title.

packs.label: Publishing · Shopping card (book cover on white)
packs.composition: Book cover centered on pure white; no background design, no styling, no scene; portrait crop with generous white margin top + bottom.
packs.technique: Book cover on pure white — Google Shopping aesthetic; everything that isn't the product is removed.

packs.label: Publishing · Premium / heritage (dark moody photo + serif overlay)
packs.composition: Dark moody close-up photo of the physical object (stacked books, illuminated pages) filling the canvas; white serif headline overlay top-left or top-center; rich shadows and warm light source.
packs.technique: Dark moody product photography with white serif text overlay — heritage cue; works for religious / luxury / legacy categories.

packs.label: Publishing · Personal / lifestyle flatlay
packs.composition: Top-down flatlay of book + coffee + textured cloth; centered composition; natural daylight; soft shadows; book centered with props in lower-third.
packs.technique: Top-down flatlay (book + complementary lifestyle props) — quiet, intimate, personal author / coaching vibe.

packs.label: SaaS / B2B · Cream BG + accent shape + product UI
packs.composition: Cream/neutral background fills the canvas; ONE bold accent shape (half-circle, illustrated arrow) sits in the lower-left third; product UI screenshot in upper-right.
packs.technique: Neutral base + single accent shape + product UI screenshot — confident, focused, gimmick-free.

packs.label: SaaS / B2B · Dashboard mockup on dark brand panel (clean)
packs.composition: Dark navy background fills the canvas; an isometric dashboard card with one bold accent-color chart line trending upward sits centered, occupying 50-60% of canvas; soft glow under the chart; subtle grid hint behind dashboard; no real data values.
packs.technique: Isometric dashboard mockup with one accent-color chart line on a dark navy field — proof-of-product visual without showing real customer data.

packs.label: SaaS / B2B · Saturated brand panel + headline + UI mockup (designed)
packs.composition: Saturated brand-color panel fills the canvas; bold sans headline left-aligned in the top-half (dark text on bright BG, or vice versa); product UI screenshot or isometric dashboard tilted slightly in the lower-right; small brand wordmark in top-right corner.
packs.technique: Brand-color panel + bold sans headline left + tilted UI mockup right + small wordmark — Robinhood Legend energy for B2B SaaS.

packs.label: Local services · Hands-doing-work close-up
packs.composition: Tight close-up of skilled hands actively doing the work (wrench on pipe, pen on contract); shallow depth-of-field; tool / object in sharp focus; clean neutral environment.
packs.technique: Macro close-up of skilled hands actively doing the work — proof-of-craft photography, no posed staff portraits.

packs.label: E-commerce · Product in styled room scene
packs.composition: Product placed in a fully-styled interior or patio scene; product occupies 30-40% of canvas; surrounding context (rug, plant, frame, window light) sells the lifestyle; warm natural light.
packs.technique: Product in a fully-styled scene (not on white) — context sells the lifestyle, surrounding objects do half the work.

packs.label: E-commerce · Product on pure white (apparel)
packs.composition: Product on pure white, 3/4 angle; centered; subtle ground shadow; no background, no scene, no props; product fills 40-50% of canvas width.
packs.technique: Product on pure white at a slight 3/4 angle — iconic e-commerce shot; soft ground shadow only.

packs.label: Subscription · Saturated brand-color panel + bold headline
packs.composition: Saturated single brand-color background fills the canvas; bold sans headline in white or dark, left-aligned, top-half; supporting illustration / accent squiggle / brand wordmark small in corner.
packs.technique: Saturated brand-color panel + bold sans headline + decorative squiggle accent — identity-heavy, instantly recognizable.

packs.label: Subscription · Lesson card (instructor + course title)
packs.composition: White or light background; brand wordmark top-center; course title centered (bold sans); instructor portrait / video thumbnail below; multi-color squiggle accents around edges; rating badge bottom-right.
packs.technique: Course card layout — brand mark + bold course title + instructor face + colorful accent lines + rating badge.

packs.label: Subscription · Dark gradient + product trio + bold headline
packs.composition: Dark gradient background (purple→black or purple→yellow); bold white serif headline top-half; product trio (3 covers/items) in the lower-half overlapping each other; offer chip somewhere mid-canvas.
packs.technique: Dark mood gradient + bold serif headline + product trio overlapping in lower-third — feel-led, not product-led; subscriptions selling emotion.

packs.label: Promotional · Dark BG + giant offer text + product strip
packs.composition: Dark background fills canvas; small brand wordmark + sub-headline top-left; GIANT offer text (e.g. '85% OFF') in white, dominant; horizontal strip of small product thumbnails bottom-third; bright accent chip ('Limited offer') in mid-canvas.
packs.technique: Dark BG + giant offer headline + product thumbnail strip + bright accent chip — promotional / discount / Black Friday energy.

packs.label: Fintech · Lime/electric panel + serif headline + product UI
packs.composition: Saturated lime (or other electric) background fills canvas; small brand wordmark top-center; bold serif/sans headline dominates top-half; product UI screenshot (phone or web) tilted in the lower-half; legal disclaimer in tiny text bottom.
packs.technique: Saturated electric-color panel + bold headline + product UI screenshot — fintech identity + proof-of-product in one frame.

packs.label: Auto / dealer · Dark gradient + person + benefit list + offer
packs.composition: Dark gradient with vehicle showroom backdrop; person standing next to car (smiling, gesturing); bold sans headline top-left ('DRIVE TODAY'); checkmark benefit list mid-canvas; red offer button bottom-left.
packs.technique: Dark gradient + person + product (car) + benefit checklist + offer chip — urgency-driven local-service ad.

packs.label: Lifestyle · Top-down hands + supplies / activity
packs.composition: Top-down view of hands actively working on a creative project (pottery, painting, crafting); supplies scattered around in organic composition; natural light; warm neutral background.
packs.technique: Top-down photo of hands engaged in creative activity, surrounded by supplies — invitational, 'you could do this' energy.

packs.label: Native · Photo + merchant strip (template chrome)
packs.composition: Standard photographic image fills the canvas; subject centered; no in-canvas text; designed to slot into a native-ad template that adds a merchant strip below.
packs.technique: Clean editorial photo — the native template adds the merchant strip and title; we just supply a documentary-grade image.
